[index.html.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/25857880/index.html.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>NA 12U Brahmas · Hockey Roster</title>
<meta name="description" content="NA 12U Brahmas Hockey Team Roster">
<meta property="og:title" content="NA 12U Brahmas · Hockey Roster">
<meta property="og:description" content="NA 12U Brahmas Hockey Team — Roster, Schedule & Standings">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="data:image/jpeg;base64,">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Barlow:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --purple: #5b2d8e;
    --purple-dark: #3a1a5c;
    --purple-light: #7b4daf;
    --deep: #0d0818;
    --black: #100c1c;
    --card: #16102a;
    --accent: #8a3fc8;
    --gold: #d4b4ff;
    --white: #f0eaf8;
    --steel: #9985b8;
    --glass: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
    background: var(--deep);
    color: #fff;
    min-height: 100vh;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    padding-bottom: 80px;
  }

  body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed; inset: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 40% at 50% 0%, rgba(91,45,142,0.35) 0%, transparent 65%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 30% at 80% 80%, rgba(58,26,92,0.2) 0%, transparent 60%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, #0d0818 0%, #100c1c 100%);
    z-index: -2;
  }

  body::after {
    content: '';
    position: fixed; inset: 0;
    background-image:
      repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 50px, rgba(255,255,255,0.012) 50px, rgba(255,255,255,0.012) 51px),
      repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, transparent 50px, rgba(255,255,255,0.012) 50px, rgba(255,255,255,0.012) 51px);
    z-index: -1;
  }

  /* HEADER */
  header {
    padding: 24px 16px 0;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
  }

  .logo-wrap {
    width: 90px; height: 90px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 3px solid var(--purple-light);
    background: var(--purple-dark);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    margin: 0 auto 14px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(91,45,142,0.6), 0 0 80px rgba(91,45,142,0.2);
    animation: glow 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  .logo-wrap img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 6px;
  }

  .logo-fallback {
    font-size: 2.4rem;
  }

  @keyframes glow {
    0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(91,45,142,0.6), 0 0 80px rgba(91,45,142,0.2); }
    50% { box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(138,63,200,0.8), 0 0 100px rgba(91,45,142,0.3); }
  }

  .team-name {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 2rem;
    font-weight: 900;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    line-height: 1;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff 20%, #d4b4ff 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
  }

  .team-sub {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    letter-spacing: 5px;
    color: var(--steel);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-top: 4px;
  }

  .divider {
    width: 60px; height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--purple-light), transparent);
    margin: 14px auto;
  }

  /* STATS BAR */
  .stats-bar {
    display: flex;
    gap: 8px;
    padding: 0 16px 16px;
    overflow-x: auto;
    scrollbar-width: none;
  }
  .stats-bar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }

  .stat-pill {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    background: rgba(91,45,142,0.2);
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.3);
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    color: var(--steel);
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .stat-pill span {
    color: var(--gold);
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 1rem;
    margin-right: 4px;
  }

  /* TABS */
  .tabs {
    display: flex;
    padding: 0 16px;
    gap: 4px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .tab {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 8px 4px;
    background: none;
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.25);
    border-radius: 8px;
    color: var(--steel);
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }

  .tab.active {
    background: var(--purple);
    border-color: var(--purple-light);
    color: #fff;
  }

  /* SEARCH */
  .search-wrap {
    padding: 0 16px 12px;
    position: relative;
  }

  .search-wrap input {
    width: 100%;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.3);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 10px 16px 10px 40px;
    color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    outline: none;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .search-wrap input:focus { border-color: var(--purple-light); }
  .search-wrap input::placeholder { color: var(--steel); }
  .search-icon {
    position: absolute;
    left: 28px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 1rem; opacity: 0.5;
  }

  /* ROSTER */
  .roster {
    padding: 0 16px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .player-card {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.15);
    border-radius: 14px;
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    align-items: stretch;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    animation: slideIn 0.4s ease both;
  }

  @keyframes slideIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(12px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  .player-card:active { transform: scale(0.98); }
  .player-card:hover { border-color: rgba(138,63,200,0.5); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(91,45,142,0.3); }

  .card-accent { width: 5px; flex-shrink: 0; }

  .card-photo {
    width: 64px; height: 64px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin: 10px 0 10px 10px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    background: var(--purple-dark);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.3);
  }

  .card-photo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 9px; }

  .card-info {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 10px 10px 10px 12px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 4px;
  }

  .card-top {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .player-number {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--gold);
    line-height: 1;
    min-width: 30px;
  }

  .player-name {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    color: #fff;
  }

  .position-badge {
    margin-left: auto;
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .card-stats {
    display: flex;
    gap: 12px;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .mini-stat { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
  .mini-stat-val {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; line-height: 1;
  }
  .mini-stat-lbl { font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(--steel); text-transform: uppercase; }
  .stat-sep { width: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); align-self: stretch; margin: 2px 0; }

  .card-pts {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0 14px 0 10px;
    border-left: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  }
  .pts-val { font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif; font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; color: #fff; }
  .pts-lbl { font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--steel); text-transform: uppercase; }

  /* MODAL */
  .modal-overlay {
    position: fixed; inset: 0;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.75);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    z-index: 100;
    display: none;
    align-items: flex-end;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 20px;
  }
  .modal-overlay.open { display: flex; }

  .modal {
    background: #1a1030;
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.35);
    border-radius: 20px 20px 16px 16px;
    width: 100%; max-width: 480px;
    max-height: 90vh;
    overflow-y: auto;
    animation: slideUp 0.3s ease;
    padding-bottom: 20px;
    box-shadow: 0 -10px 60px rgba(91,45,142,0.4);
  }

  @keyframes slideUp {
    from { transform: translateY(40px); opacity: 0; }
    to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
  }

  .modal-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 14px;
    padding: 20px 20px 16px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.2);
    position: relative;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(91,45,142,0.2), transparent);
  }

  .modal-photo {
    width: 80px; height: 80px;
    border-radius: 14px;
    background: var(--purple-dark);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 2.2rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 2px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.4);
  }
  .modal-photo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }

  .modal-title { flex: 1; }
  .modal-number {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 3px;
  }
  .modal-name {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.7rem; font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.1;
  }
  .modal-pos {
    display: inline-block;
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 2px 10px;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: #fff; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 5px;
  }

  .close-btn {
    position: absolute; top: 16px; right: 16px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border: none; border-radius: 50%;
    width: 32px; height: 32px;
    color: var(--steel); font-size: 1.1rem;
    cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  }

  .modal-stats {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 8px;
    padding: 16px 20px;
  }

  .mstat {
    background: rgba(91,45,142,0.15);
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.2);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 10px 6px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .mstat-val { font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; line-height: 1; }
  .mstat-lbl { font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 1.5px; color: var(--steel); text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 2px; }

  .modal-link {
    padding: 0 20px 12px;
  }
  .thl-link {
    display: block;
    background: rgba(91,45,142,0.2);
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.3);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    color: var(--gold);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-align: center;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .thl-link:hover { background: rgba(91,45,142,0.4); }

  .modal-photo-upload { padding: 0 20px; }
  .upload-btn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 11px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    border: 1px dashed rgba(138,63,200,0.4);
    border-radius: 10px;
    color: var(--steel);
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.85rem; letter-spacing: 1px;
    cursor: pointer; text-align: center; transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .upload-btn:hover { background: rgba(91,45,142,0.2); border-color: var(--purple-light); color: #fff; }

  .modal-actions {
    padding: 10px 20px 0;
    display: flex;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .btn {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 11px;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-edit { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #ccc; }
  .btn-delete { background: rgba(150,30,30,0.5); color: #fca5a5; border: 1px solid rgba(200,30,30,0.3); }

  /* ADD FORM */
  .add-section { padding: 0 16px 20px; }

  .form-card {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.2);
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 20px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 14px;
  }

  .form-title {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800;
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--gold);
  }

  .form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; }

  .form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }

  .form-group label {
    font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--steel); font-weight: 600;
  }

  .form-group input, .form-group select {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.25);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 9px 12px;
    color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem;
    outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s;
    -webkit-appearance: none;
  }
  .form-group input:focus, .form-group select:focus { border-color: var(--purple-light); }
  .form-group select option { background: #1a1030; }

  .submit-btn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 13px;
    background: var(--purple);
    border: none; border-radius: 10px;
    color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .submit-btn:hover { background: var(--purple-light); }
  .submit-btn:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

  /* BOTTOM NAV */
  .bottom-nav {
    position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    background: rgba(13,8,24,0.95);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.2);
    display: flex;
    z-index: 50;
    padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom);
  }

  .nav-item {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 10px 0; gap: 3px;
    cursor: pointer; background: none; border: none;
    color: var(--steel); transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-item.active { color: var(--gold); }
  .nav-item-icon { font-size: 1.3rem; }
  .nav-item-lbl {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600;
  }

  .empty-state { text-align: center; padding: 40px 20px; color: var(--steel); }
  .empty-state div { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .empty-state p { font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 1px; }

  /* COACHING STAFF */
  .staff-section { padding: 0 16px 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }

  .staff-label {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 4px; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--steel); padding: 4px 0 2px;
  }

  .coach-card {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.15);
    border-radius: 14px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    gap: 14px;
    animation: slideIn 0.4s ease both;
  }

  .coach-icon {
    width: 54px; height: 54px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(91,45,142,0.3);
    border: 2px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.4);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .coach-info { flex: 1; }

  .coach-name {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 800;
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    color: #fff;
  }

  .coach-role {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.8rem; letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold);
    margin-top: 2px;
  }

  .coach-badge {
    background: rgba(91,45,142,0.3);
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.4);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 4px 10px;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(--gold);
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  /* SCHEDULE */
  .schedule-section { padding: 0 16px 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; }

  .schedule-day-header {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 900;
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 4px;
    color: var(--gold);
    padding: 6px 0 2px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.3);
    margin-top: 6px;
  }

  .game-card {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.15);
    border-radius: 14px;
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    align-items: stretch;
    animation: slideIn 0.4s ease both;
    position: relative;
  }

  .game-card.championship {
    border-color: rgba(212,180,255,0.4);
    box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(212,180,255,0.1);
  }

  .game-accent { width: 5px; flex-shrink: 0; }

  .game-body { flex: 1; padding: 12px 14px; }

  .game-time {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--steel);
    text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  .game-matchup {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: #fff;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .game-matchup .brahmas { color: var(--gold); }

  .game-venue {
    font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--steel);
    margin-top: 5px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
  }

  .game-badge {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    padding: 0 14px;
    border-left: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    font-size: 1.4rem;
  }

  .champ-label {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-top: 2px;
  }

  /* SCORE ENTRY */
  .score-row {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    margin-top: 8px; padding-top: 8px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
  }
  .score-team-lbl {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(--steel);
    text-transform: uppercase; flex: 1;
  }
  .score-input {
    width: 48px; padding: 5px 6px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.3);
    border-radius: 7px; color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800;
    text-align: center; outline: none;
    -moz-appearance: textfield;
  }
  .score-input::-webkit-inner-spin-button,
  .score-input::-webkit-outer-spin-button { -webkit-appearance: none; }
  .score-input:focus { border-color: var(--purple-light); }
  .score-sep { font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--steel); }
  .score-save-btn {
    padding: 5px 12px;
    background: var(--purple);
    border: none; border-radius: 7px;
    color: #fff; font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .score-save-btn:hover { background: var(--purple-light); }
  .score-result {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 1px;
    margin-top: 6px;
  }
  .score-result.win  { color: #4ade80; }
  .score-result.loss { color: #f87171; }
  .score-result.tie  { color: var(--gold); }

  /* STANDINGS */
  .standings-section { padding: 0 16px 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
  .standings-header {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 4px; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--steel); padding: 4px 0 2px;
  }
  .standings-table {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,63,200,0.2);
    border-radius: 14px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .standings-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
  }
  .standings-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .standings-row.header-row {
    background: rgba(91,45,142,0.2);
    padding: 8px 14px;
  }
  .standings-row.brahmas-row { background: rgba(91,45,142,0.1); }
  .standings-col {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .standings-col.team-col { text-align: left; font-size: 1rem; }
  .standings-col.brahmas-name { color: var(--gold); }
  .standings-col.header-lbl {
    font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: var(--steel); text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .standings-col.pts-col { color: var(--gold); font-size: 1.1rem; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <div class="logo-wrap">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"
         alt="Brahmas Logo"
         onerror="this.parentElement.innerHTML='<div class=\'logo-fallback\'>🐂</div>'">
  </div>
  <div class="team-name">NA 12U Brahmas</div>
  <div class="team-sub">NA Show Series · 2025–26</div>
  <div class="divider"></div>
</header>

<div class="stats-bar" id="statsBar"></div>

<div class="tabs">
  <button class="tab active" onclick="switchFilter('all', this)">All</button>
  <button class="tab" onclick="switchFilter('forwards', this)">Forwards</button>
  <button class="tab" onclick="switchFilter('defense', this)">Defense</button>
  <button class="tab" onclick="switchFilter('goalies', this)">Goalies</button>
</div>

<div id="rosterView">
  <div class="search-wrap">
    <span class="search-icon">🔍</span>
    <input type="text" id="searchInput" placeholder="Search players..." oninput="renderRoster()">
  </div>
  <div class="roster" id="rosterList"></div>
</div>

<div id="addView" style="display:none">
  <div class="add-section">
    <div class="form-card">
      <div class="form-title">➕ Add Player</div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Full Name</label>
        <input type="text" id="fName" placeholder="Player Name">
      </div>
      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Jersey #</label>
          <input type="number" id="fNum" placeholder="00" min="1" max="99">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Position</label>
          <select id="fPos">
            <option value="C">Center (C)</option>
            <option value="W">Winger (W)</option>
            <option value="D">Defense (D)</option>
            <option value="G">Goalie (G)</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Goals</label>
          <input type="number" id="fGoals" placeholder="0" min="0">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Assists</label>
          <input type="number" id="fAssists" placeholder="0" min="0">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>PIM</label>
          <input type="number" id="fPIM" placeholder="0" min="0">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Games Played</label>
          <input type="number" id="fGP" placeholder="0" min="0">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>THL Stats Link (optional)</label>
        <input type="text" id="fLink" placeholder="https://texashockeyleague.com/...">
      </div>
      <button class="submit-btn" onclick="addPlayer()">Add to Roster</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>



<div id="scheduleView" style="display:none">
  <div class="schedule-section">

    <div class="schedule-day-header">📅 Saturday</div>

    <div class="game-card" style="animation-delay:0.05s">
      <div class="game-accent" style="background:#7b4daf"></div>
      <div class="game-body">
        <div class="game-time">⏰ 11:15a – 12:15p</div>
        <div class="game-matchup"><span class="brahmas">Brahmas 12U</span> vs Amarillo 12U</div>
        <div class="game-venue">📍 <a href="https://maps.google.com/?q=301+S+Grant,+Amarillo,+TX+79101" target="_blank" style="color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;">🗺 Ice Ranch · 301 S Grant, Amarillo, TX 79101</a></div>
        <div id="result-g0" class="score-result"></div>
        <div class="score-row">
          <span class="score-team-lbl">Brahmas</span>
          <input class="score-input" id="g0-h" type="number" min="0" placeholder="–">
          <span class="score-sep">–</span>
          <input class="score-input" id="g0-a" type="number" min="0" placeholder="–">
          <span class="score-team-lbl" style="text-align:right">Amarillo</span>
          <button class="score-save-btn" onclick="saveScore(0)">Save</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="game-card" style="animation-delay:0.1s">
      <div class="game-accent" style="background:#5b2d8e"></div>
      <div class="game-body">
        <div class="game-time">⏰ 2:15p – 3:15p</div>
        <div class="game-matchup">New Mexico 12U vs <span class="brahmas">Brahmas 12U</span></div>
        <div class="game-venue">📍 <a href="https://maps.google.com/?q=Amarillo+Civic+Center,+301+S+Buchanan+St,+Amarillo,+TX+79101" target="_blank" style="color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;">🗺 Civic Center · 301 S Grant, Amarillo, TX 79101</a></div>
        <div id="result-g1" class="score-result"></div>
        <div class="score-row">
          <span class="score-team-lbl">New Mexico</span>
          <input class="score-input" id="g1-a" type="number" min="0" placeholder="–">
          <span class="score-sep">–</span>
          <input class="score-input" id="g1-h" type="number" min="0" placeholder="–">
          <span class="score-team-lbl" style="text-align:right">Brahmas</span>
          <button class="score-save-btn" onclick="saveScore(1)">Save</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="schedule-day-header">📅 Sunday</div>

    <div class="game-card" style="animation-delay:0.15s">
      <div class="game-accent" style="background:#7b4daf"></div>
      <div class="game-body">
        <div class="game-time">⏰ 9:00a – 10:00a</div>
        <div class="game-matchup">Brahmas 12U vs Amarillo 12U</div>
        <div class="game-venue">📍 <a href="https://maps.google.com/?q=301+S+Grant,+Amarillo,+TX+79101" target="_blank" style="color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;">🗺 Ice Ranch · 301 S Grant, Amarillo, TX 79101</a></div>
        <div id="result-g2" class="score-result"></div>
        <div class="score-row">
          <span class="score-team-lbl">Seed 2</span>
          <input class="score-input" id="g2-h" type="number" min="0" placeholder="–">
          <span class="score-sep">–</span>
          <input class="score-input" id="g2-a" type="number" min="0" placeholder="–">
          <span class="score-team-lbl" style="text-align:right">Seed 3</span>
          <button class="score-save-btn" onclick="saveScore(2)">Save</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="game-card championship" style="animation-delay:0.2s">
      <div class="game-accent" style="background:linear-gradient(180deg,#d4b4ff,#7b4daf)"></div>
      <div class="game-body">
        <div class="game-time">⏰ 12:00p – 1:00p</div>
        <div class="game-matchup">🏆 New Mexico 12U vs Brahmas 12U 🏆</div>
        <div class="game-venue">📍 <a href="https://maps.google.com/?q=301+S+Grant,+Amarillo,+TX+79101" target="_blank" style="color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;">🗺 Ice Ranch · 301 S Grant, Amarillo, TX 79101</a></div>
        <div id="result-g3" class="score-result"></div>
        <div class="score-row">
          <span class="score-team-lbl">Team 1</span>
          <input class="score-input" id="g3-h" type="number" min="0" placeholder="–">
          <span class="score-sep">–</span>
          <input class="score-input" id="g3-a" type="number" min="0" placeholder="–">
          <span class="score-team-lbl" style="text-align:right">Team 2</span>
          <button class="score-save-btn" onclick="saveScore(3)">Save</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="game-badge">🏆<div class="champ-label">Final</div></div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>


<div id="standingsView" style="display:none">
  <div class="standings-section">
    <div class="standings-header">12U Playoff Standings</div>
    <div class="standings-table" id="standingsTable"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="coachView" style="display:none">
  <div class="staff-section">
    <div class="staff-label">Coaching Staff</div>

    <div class="coach-card" style="animation-delay:0.05s; border-left: 5px solid #7b4daf;">
      <div class="coach-icon">🏒</div>
      <div class="coach-info">
        <div class="coach-name">Jason McGee</div>
        <div class="coach-role">Head Coach</div>
      </div>
      <div class="coach-badge">HC</div>
    </div>

    <div class="coach-card" style="animation-delay:0.1s; border-left: 5px solid #3a1a5c;">
      <div class="coach-icon">📋</div>
      <div class="coach-info">
        <div class="coach-name">Todd Luther</div>
        <div class="coach-role">Assistant Coach</div>
      </div>
      <div class="coach-badge">AC</div>
    </div>

    <div class="coach-card" style="animation-delay:0.15s; border-left: 5px solid #3a1a5c;">
      <div class="coach-icon">📋</div>
      <div class="coach-info">
        <div class="coach-name">Bill DiGaetano</div>
        <div class="coach-role">Assistant Coach</div>
      </div>
      <div class="coach-badge">AC</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="modalOverlay" onclick="handleOverlayClick(event)">
  <div class="modal" id="modal">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <div class="modal-photo" id="modalPhoto"></div>
      <div class="modal-title">
        <div class="modal-number" id="modalNum"></div>
        <div class="modal-name" id="modalName"></div>
        <div class="modal-pos" id="modalPos"></div>
      </div>
      <button class="close-btn" onclick="closeModal()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-stats" id="modalStats"></div>
    <div class="modal-link" id="modalLinkWrap"></div>
    <div class="modal-photo-upload">
      <input type="file" id="photoInput" accept="image/*" style="display:none" onchange="handlePhotoUpload(event)">
      <div class="upload-btn" onclick="document.getElementById('photoInput').click()">📷 Upload Player Photo</div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn btn-edit" onclick="editPlayerStats()">✏️ Edit Stats</button>
      <button class="btn btn-delete" onclick="deletePlayer()">🗑 Remove</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="bottom-nav">
  <button class="nav-item active" id="navRoster" onclick="switchMainTab('roster')">
    <div class="nav-item-icon">👥</div>
    <div class="nav-item-lbl">Roster</div>
  </button>
  <button class="nav-item" id="navSchedule" onclick="switchMainTab('schedule')">
    <div class="nav-item-icon">📅</div>
    <div class="nav-item-lbl">Schedule</div>
  </button>
  <button class="nav-item" id="navStandings" onclick="switchMainTab('standings')">
    <div class="nav-item-icon">🏆</div>
    <div class="nav-item-lbl">Standings</div>
  </button>
  <button class="nav-item" id="navCoach" onclick="switchMainTab('coach')">
    <div class="nav-item-icon">🎽</div>
    <div class="nav-item-lbl">Coaches</div>
  </button>
  <button class="nav-item" id="navAdd" onclick="switchMainTab('add')">
    <div class="nav-item-icon">➕</div>
    <div class="nav-item-lbl">Add Player</div>
  </button>
</div>

<script>
// Position colors using team palette
const POS_COLORS = {
  C: '#7b4daf',
  W: '#5b2d8e',
  D: '#3a1a5c',
  G: '#2d1a4a'
};

const POS_BADGE = {
  C: { bg: 'rgba(123,77,175,0.3)', border: 'rgba(123,77,175,0.6)', color: '#d4b4ff' },
  W: { bg: 'rgba(91,45,142,0.3)', border: 'rgba(138,63,200,0.6)', color: '#c9a0ff' },
  D: { bg: 'rgba(58,26,92,0.4)', border: 'rgba(90,60,130,0.6)', color: '#b090e0' },
  G: { bg: 'rgba(45,26,74,0.4)', border: 'rgba(80,50,110,0.6)', color: '#a080d0' }
};

function getEmoji(pos) {
  if (pos === 'G') return '🥅';
  if (pos === 'D') return '🛡️';
  return '🏒';
}

let players = [
  { id:1,  name:'Alex Fioroni',      number:1,  pos:'G', goals:0,  assists:0,  pim:0,  gp:2, ga:6, shots:65, photo:null, link:'https://www.texashockeyleague.com/stats#/player/2666460/stats' },
  { id:2,  name:'Huxley Belton',     number:4,  pos:'D', goals:0,  assists:0,  pim:0,  gp:2, photo:null, link:'https://www.texashockeyleague.com/stats#/player/3317836/stats' },
  { id:3,  name:'Mark Hodjihanov',   number:8,  pos:'C', goals:0,  assists:1,  pim:0,  gp:2, photo:null, link:'https://www.texashockeyleague.com/stats#/player/2666461/stats' },
  { id:4,  name:'Gunner McGee',      number:9,  pos:'C', goals:1,  assists:1,  pim:0,  gp:2, photo:'data:image/jpeg;base64,', link:'https://www.texashockeyleague.com/stats#/player/1899284/stats' },
  { id:5,  name:'Remy Houde',        number:16, pos:'D', goals:0,  assists:0,  pim:0,  gp:2, photo:'data:image/jpeg;base64,', link:'https://www.texashockeyleague.com/stats#/player/3317834/stats' },
  { id:6,  name:'Aaron Jackson',     number:27, pos:'D', goals:1,  assists:1,  pim:0,  gp:2, photo:'data:image/jpeg;base64,', link:'https://www.texashockeyleague.com/stats#/player/2666462/stats' },
  { id:7,  name:'Xander Fioroni',    number:34, pos:'W', goals:1,  assists:0,  pim:0,  gp:2, photo:'data:image/jpeg;base64,', link:'https://www.texashockeyleague.com/stats#/player/2666459/stats' },
  { id:8,  name:'Luca DiGaetano',    number:44, pos:'D', goals:0,  assists:0,  pim:0,  gp:2, photo:'data:image/jpeg;base64,', link:'https://www.texashockeyleague.com/stats#/player/1899277/stats' },
  { id:9,  name:'Rhett Southard',    number:48, pos:'W', goals:0,  assists:0,  pim:0,  gp:2, photo:'data:image/jpeg;base64,', link:'https://www.texashockeyleague.com/stats#/player/1899289/stats' },
  { id:10, name:'Deryck Dullock',    number:49, pos:'W', goals:1,  assists:0,  pim:0,  gp:2, photo:'data:image/jpeg;base64,', link:'https://www.texashockeyleague.com/stats#/player/1309823/stats' },
  { id:11, name:'Ryan Stroer',       number:97, pos:'W', goals:0,  assists:0,  pim:0,  gp:2, photo:null, link:'https://www.texashockeyleague.com/stats#/player/3317841/stats' },
  { id:12, name:'Kolin Born',        number:98, pos:'W', goals:0,  assists:0,  pim:0,  gp:2, photo:'data:image/jpeg;base64,', link:'https://www.texashockeyleague.com/stats#/player/2666422/stats' },
];
let nextId = 13;
let activeFilter = 'all';
let selectedId = null;

function renderStatsBar() {
  const total = players.length;
  const goals = players.reduce((s,p) => s + p.goals, 0);
  const assists = players.reduce((s,p) => s + p.assists, 0);
  document.getElementById('statsBar').innerHTML = `
    <div class="stat-pill"><span>${total}</span> Players</div>
    <div class="stat-pill"><span>${goals}</span> Goals</div>
    <div class="stat-pill"><span>${assists}</span> Assists</div>
    <div class="stat-pill"><span>${goals + assists}</span> Points</div>
  `;
}

function getFiltered() {
  let list = [...players];
  const q = (document.getElementById('searchInput')?.value || '').toLowerCase();
  if (q) list = list.filter(p => p.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) || String(p.number).includes(q));
  if (activeFilter === 'forwards') list = list.filter(p => ['C','W'].includes(p.pos));
  if (activeFilter === 'defense') list = list.filter(p => p.pos === 'D');
  if (activeFilter === 'goalies') list = list.filter(p => p.pos === 'G');
  return list.sort((a,b) => a.number - b.number);
}

function renderRoster() {
  const list = getFiltered();
  const el = document.getElementById('rosterList');
  if (!list.length) {
    el.innerHTML = `<div class="empty-state"><div>🏒</div><p>No players found</p></div>`;
    return;
  }
  const badge = (pos) => {
    const b = POS_BADGE[pos] || POS_BADGE.C;
    return `<div class="position-badge" style="background:${b.bg};border:1px solid ${b.border};color:${b.color}">${pos}</div>`;
  };
  el.innerHTML = list.map((p, i) => `
    <div class="player-card" style="animation-delay:${i*0.04}s" onclick="openModal(${p.id})">
      <div class="card-accent" style="background:${POS_COLORS[p.pos]}"></div>
      <div class="card-photo">
        ${p.photo ? `<img src="${p.photo}" alt="${p.name}">` : getEmoji(p.pos)}
      </div>
      <div class="card-info">
        <div class="card-top">
          <div class="player-number">#${p.number}</div>
          <div class="player-name">${p.name}</div>
          ${badge(p.pos)}
        </div>
        <div class="card-stats">
          ${p.pos === 'G' ? `
          <div class="mini-stat"><div class="mini-stat-val">${((p.ga||0)/Math.max(p.gp,1)).toFixed(2)}</div><div class="mini-stat-lbl">GAA</div></div>
          <div class="stat-sep"></div>
          <div class="mini-stat"><div class="mini-stat-val">${p.shots ? (((p.shots-(p.ga||0))/p.shots)*100).toFixed(1)+'%' : '—'}</div><div class="mini-stat-lbl">SV%</div></div>
          <div class="stat-sep"></div>
          <div class="mini-stat"><div class="mini-stat-val">${p.ga||0}</div><div class="mini-stat-lbl">GA</div></div>
          <div class="stat-sep"></div>
          <div class="mini-stat"><div class="mini-stat-val">${p.gp}</div><div class="mini-stat-lbl">GP</div></div>
          ` : `
          <div class="mini-stat"><div class="mini-stat-val">${p.goals}</div><div class="mini-stat-lbl">G</div></div>
          <div class="stat-sep"></div>
          <div class="mini-stat"><div class="mini-stat-val">${p.assists}</div><div class="mini-stat-lbl">A</div></div>
          <div class="stat-sep"></div>
          <div class="mini-stat"><div class="mini-stat-val">${p.pim}</div><div class="mini-stat-lbl">PIM</div></div>
          <div class="stat-sep"></div>
          <div class="mini-stat"><div class="mini-stat-val">${p.gp}</div><div class="mini-stat-lbl">GP</div></div>
          `}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card-pts">
        ${p.pos === 'G' ? `
        <div class="pts-val">${(p.shots||0)-(p.ga||0)}</div>
        <div class="pts-lbl">SVS</div>
        ` : `
        <div class="pts-val">${p.goals + p.assists}</div>
        <div class="pts-lbl">PTS</div>
        `}
      </div>
    </div>
  `).join('');
}

function switchFilter(filter, btn) {
  activeFilter = filter;
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  renderRoster();
}

// ── Scores stored in memory ──
// games[i] = { brahmasScore, oppScore } or null
// brahmasIndex: 0=game0(home), 1=game1(away), 2=N/A(seed game), 3=champ
// brahmasIsHome: [true, false, false, false] (seed/champ = not tracked for W/L of Brahmas specifically)
const BRAHMAS_GAMES = [0, 1]; // game indices where Brahmas play
const BRAHMAS_HOME  = { 0: true, 1: false }; // true=brahmas score is g#-h
let scores = { 0: null, 1: null, 2: null, 3: null };

function saveScore(g) {
  const hEl = document.getElementById('g'+g+'-h');
  const aEl = document.getElementById('g'+g+'-a');
  const h = parseInt(hEl.value);
  const a = parseInt(aEl.value);
  if (isNaN(h) || isNaN(a)) { alert('Enter both scores first.'); return; }
  scores[g] = { h, a };
  showResult(g);
  renderStandings();
}

function showResult(g) {
  const s = scores[g];
  if (!s) return;
  const el = document.getElementById('result-g'+g);
  if (!el) return;

  // Only show W/L/T label for Brahmas games
  if (BRAHMAS_GAMES.includes(g)) {
    const brahmasScore = BRAHMAS_HOME[g] ? s.h : s.a;
    const oppScore     = BRAHMAS_HOME[g] ? s.a : s.h;
    if (brahmasScore > oppScore) {
      el.textContent = 'W ' + (BRAHMAS_HOME[g] ? s.h+' – '+s.a : s.a+' – '+s.h);
      el.className = 'score-result win';
    } else if (brahmasScore < oppScore) {
      el.textContent = 'L ' + (BRAHMAS_HOME[g] ? s.h+' – '+s.a : s.a+' – '+s.h);
      el.className = 'score-result loss';
    } else {
      el.textContent = 'T ' + s.h+' – '+s.a;
      el.className = 'score-result tie';
    }
  } else {
    el.textContent = s.h + ' – ' + s.a;
    el.className = 'score-result tie';
  }
}

// getRecord replaced by getRecordFor

function getRecordFor(team) {
  // team: 'brahmas', 'amarillo', 'newmexico'
  let w=0, l=0, t=0;
  // Game 0: Brahmas(h) vs Amarillo(a)   → g0-h=Brahmas, g0-a=Amarillo
  // Game 1: NewMexico(h) vs Brahmas(a)  → g1-h=NewMexico, g1-a=Brahmas
  // Game 2: NewMexico(h) vs Amarillo(a) → g2-h=NewMexico, g2-a=Amarillo
  const games = {
    brahmas:   [ {g:0, mine:'h', opp:'a'}, {g:1, mine:'a', opp:'h'}, {g:2, mine:'h', opp:'a'}, {g:3, mine:'a', opp:'h'} ],
    amarillo:  [ {g:0, mine:'a', opp:'h'}, {g:2, mine:'a', opp:'h'} ],
    newmexico: [ {g:1, mine:'h', opp:'a'}, {g:3, mine:'h', opp:'a'} ],
  };
  (games[team] || []).forEach(({ g, mine, opp }) => {
    const s = scores[g];
    if (!s) return;
    const ms = s[mine], os = s[opp];
    if (ms > os) w++;
    else if (ms < os) l++;
    else t++;
  });
  return { w, l, t, gp: w+l+t };
}

function renderStandings() {
  const table = document.getElementById('standingsTable');
  if (!table) return;

  const teams = [
    { key:'brahmas',   label:'🐂 Brahmas 12U',    isBrahmas: true  },
    { key:'amarillo',  label:'Amarillo 12U',       isBrahmas: false },
    { key:'newmexico', label:'New Mexico 12U',     isBrahmas: false },
  ];

  const rows = teams
    .map(t => ({ ...t, rec: getRecordFor(t.key) }))
    .sort((a, b) => (b.rec.w*2+b.rec.t) - (a.rec.w*2+a.rec.t));

  table.innerHTML = `
    <div class="standings-row header-row">
      <div class="standings-col header-lbl team-col">Team</div>
      <div class="standings-col header-lbl">GP</div>
      <div class="standings-col header-lbl">W</div>
      <div class="standings-col header-lbl">L</div>
      <div class="standings-col header-lbl">T</div>
    </div>
    ${rows.map(t => `
    <div class="standings-row ${t.isBrahmas ? 'brahmas-row' : ''}">
      <div class="standings-col team-col ${t.isBrahmas ? 'brahmas-name' : ''}">${t.label}</div>
      <div class="standings-col">${t.rec.gp}</div>
      <div class="standings-col" style="color:#4ade80">${t.rec.w}</div>
      <div class="standings-col" style="color:#f87171">${t.rec.l}</div>
      <div class="standings-col" style="color:var(--gold)">${t.rec.t}</div>
    </div>`).join('')}
  `;
}

function switchMainTab(tab) {
  ['navRoster','navSchedule','navStandings','navCoach','navAdd'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.classList.toggle('active', id === 'nav'+tab.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+tab.slice(1));
  });
  ['rosterView','scheduleView','standingsView','coachView','addView'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.style.display = id === tab+'View' ? '' : 'none';
  });
  if (tab === 'standings') renderStandings();
}

function openModal(id) {
  const p = players.find(x => x.id === id);
  if (!p) return;
  selectedId = id;

  document.getElementById('modalNum').textContent = `JERSEY #${p.number}`;
  document.getElementById('modalName').textContent = p.name;

  const b = POS_BADGE[p.pos] || POS_BADGE.C;
  const posEl = document.getElementById('modalPos');
  posEl.textContent = { C:'Center', W:'Winger', D:'Defense', G:'Goalie' }[p.pos] || p.pos;
  posEl.style.background = b.bg;
  posEl.style.border = `1px solid ${b.border}`;
  posEl.style.color = b.color;

  const photo = document.getElementById('modalPhoto');
  photo.innerHTML = p.photo ? `<img src="${p.photo}" alt="${p.name}">` : `<span style="font-size:2.2rem">${getEmoji(p.pos)}</span>`;

  if (p.pos === 'G') {
    const gaa = (p.ga||0) / Math.max(p.gp,1);
    const svpct = p.shots ? ((p.shots-(p.ga||0))/p.shots*100) : 0;
    document.getElementById('modalStats').innerHTML = `
      <div class="mstat"><div class="mstat-val">${p.gp}</div><div class="mstat-lbl">GP</div></div>
      <div class="mstat"><div class="mstat-val">${p.ga||0}</div><div class="mstat-lbl">Goals Against</div></div>
      <div class="mstat"><div class="mstat-val">${p.shots||0}</div><div class="mstat-lbl">Shots Faced</div></div>
      <div class="mstat"><div class="mstat-val">${(p.shots||0)-(p.ga||0)}</div><div class="mstat-lbl">Saves</div></div>
      <div class="mstat"><div class="mstat-val" style="color:var(--gold)">${gaa.toFixed(2)}</div><div class="mstat-lbl">GAA</div></div>
      <div class="mstat" style="grid-column:span 3"><div class="mstat-val" style="color:var(--gold)">${svpct.toFixed(1)}%</div><div class="mstat-lbl">Save Percentage</div></div>
    `;
  } else {
    document.getElementById('modalStats').innerHTML = `
      <div class="mstat"><div class="mstat-val">${p.gp}</div><div class="mstat-lbl">GP</div></div>
      <div class="mstat"><div class="mstat-val">${p.goals}</div><div class="mstat-lbl">Goals</div></div>
      <div class="mstat"><div class="mstat-val">${p.assists}</div><div class="mstat-lbl">Assists</div></div>
      <div class="mstat"><div class="mstat-val" style="color:var(--gold)">${p.goals+p.assists}</div><div class="mstat-lbl">Points</div></div>
      <div class="mstat" style="grid-column:1/-1"><div class="mstat-val">${p.pim}</div><div class="mstat-lbl">Penalty Minutes</div></div>
    `;
  }

  const linkWrap = document.getElementById('modalLinkWrap');
  if (p.link) {
    linkWrap.innerHTML = `<a class="thl-link" href="${p.link}" target="_blank">🔗 View on NA Show Series ↗</a>`;
  } else {
    linkWrap.innerHTML = '';
  }

  document.getElementById('modalOverlay').classList.add('open');
}

function handleOverlayClick(e) {
  if (e.target === document.getElementById('modalOverlay')) closeModal();
}

function closeModal() {
  document.getElementById('modalOverlay').classList.remove('open');
}

function handlePhotoUpload(e) {
  const file = e.target.files[0];
  if (!file) return;
  const reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = ev => {
    const p = players.find(x => x.id === selectedId);
    if (p) { p.photo = ev.target.result; openModal(selectedId); renderRoster(); }
  };
  reader.readAsDataURL(file);
}

function editPlayerStats() {
  const p = players.find(x => x.id === selectedId);
  if (!p) return;
  const goals = prompt('Goals:', p.goals); if (goals === null) return;
  const assists = prompt('Assists:', p.assists); if (assists === null) return;
  const pim = prompt('Penalty Minutes:', p.pim); if (pim === null) return;
  const gp = prompt('Games Played:', p.gp); if (gp === null) return;
  p.goals = parseInt(goals)||0; p.assists = parseInt(assists)||0;
  p.pim = parseInt(pim)||0; p.gp = parseInt(gp)||0;
  openModal(selectedId); renderRoster(); renderStatsBar();
}

function deletePlayer() {
  if (!confirm('Remove this player from the roster?')) return;
  players = players.filter(p => p.id !== selectedId);
  closeModal(); renderRoster(); renderStatsBar();
}

function addPlayer() {
  const name = document.getElementById('fName').value.trim();
  const num = parseInt(document.getElementById('fNum').value);
  const pos = document.getElementById('fPos').value;
  const goals = parseInt(document.getElementById('fGoals').value)||0;
  const assists = parseInt(document.getElementById('fAssists').value)||0;
  const pim = parseInt(document.getElementById('fPIM').value)||0;
  const gp = parseInt(document.getElementById('fGP').value)||0;
  const link = document.getElementById('fLink').value.trim();

  if (!name || !num) { alert('Name and jersey number are required.'); return; }
  if (players.find(p => p.number === num)) { alert(`Jersey #${num} is already taken!`); return; }

  players.push({ id: nextId++, name, number: num, pos, goals, assists, pim, gp, photo: null, link });
  ['fName','fNum','fGoals','fAssists','fPIM','fGP','fLink'].forEach(id => document.getElementById(id).value = '');
  document.getElementById('fPos').value = 'C';

  renderRoster(); renderStatsBar(); switchMainTab('roster');
}

// Init
renderStatsBar();
renderRoster();

// Pre-load known scores
scores[0] = { h: 4, a: 0 }; // Brahmas 4 - Amarillo 0
scores[1] = { h: 6, a: 0 }; // New Mexico 6 - Brahmas 0
scores[2] = { h: 5, a: 2 }; // Brahmas 5 - Amarillo 2
scores[3] = { h: 3, a: 0 }; // New Mexico 3 - Brahmas 0

// Pre-fill input fields
window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  // Game 0 - Brahmas 4 vs Amarillo 0
  const g0h = document.getElementById('g0-h');
  const g0a = document.getElementById('g0-a');
  if (g0h) g0h.value = 4;
  if (g0a) g0a.value = 0;
  showResult(0);

  // Game 1 - New Mexico 6 vs Brahmas 0
  const g1h = document.getElementById('g1-h');
  const g1a = document.getElementById('g1-a');
  if (g1h) g1h.value = 6;
  if (g1a) g1a.value = 0;
  showResult(1);

  // Game 2 - Brahmas vs Amarillo
  const g2h = document.getElementById('g2-h');
  const g2a = document.getElementById('g2-a');
  if (g2h) g2h.value = 5;
  if (g2a) g2a.value = 2;
  showResult(2);

  // Game 3 - New Mexico vs Brahmas (Championship)
  const g3h = document.getElementById('g3-h');
  const g3a = document.getElementById('g3-a');
  if (g3h) g3h.value = 3;
  if (g3a) g3a.value = 0;
  showResult(3);

  renderStandings();
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
